posts.cooked:
Hello everyone!

Im glad to introduce the LBA: Lupin Island Destiny Mod Project to all you members of the MBN.

This project has as main protagonist our hero of all times: Twinsen!

Fergus asks Twinsen for some gas so he can use his hidroglider, an this is how the story begins!

Twinsen takes some gas from hes house at Tiliar Island, but, will he suceed?
What will happen to our hero during his adventure to Lupin Island?
What obstacles will he find?

All these questions will be answered when LBA:LID Project is released.

The member of this team are:

agustin
OBrasilo

Until now we have only some few grids and 2 musics

Anyone wanting to help this project contact us to lbacid@gmail.com

- Agustin: Your forgot the new, third member of our Team: the RingMan.

Yes, thats the very same RingMan, that also works in the LBA: The Great Rebellion Team (oh, and your progress is more advanced, than the LBA: The Great Rebellion progress was, at the time I made that thread).
oh sorry, RingMan is our third member, anyone wanting to help post!
Anyway, the RimgMan is our main Japanese translator, and our main pixel artist.
Hope this is a small project so we can see it running in few time.

--> Fan Games?

Anyways, glad to see another project up and running.
LBA:Lupin Island Destiny is another fan project just like LBAPrequel and LBAThe Great Rebellion. And thanks for the comment double J
OK! Hope to see progress soon.
Will be this project an open project? I mean, the fans could follow the progress?

Id like to join, but remember most of my time will be going into the prequel/TGR.

I could chime in a grid or two
Is this for LBA1 or 2?

Same as what Jesse said. Except I can do voices, rather than grids.

But again, 100% of my time is devoted to the pre-existing projects.

LBAWinOwns:

Is this for LBA1 or 2?

For LBA1 like they say in the description.

Wow you even earnt yourself a subforum!
Any ways in which I could help? Noob stuff?
Anyway, good luck with the project!
I wonder what the project will be about? storywise and such?
Yeah, Id like to know also :). Anyway, this project have all to be succeeded like TGR, because they dont need to make almost everything new.
Any more news on this Agustin? Or is this project dead XD?
He isnt a so active member here, so we dont know nothing about him and the project.
Agustin, youve been online now and then lately, any news on the project?

Hi everyone! Sorry that I dindnt post news of the project in all this time.

No, the project is not dead, and we have 2 new members: Allindir and Sonartica.

We have decided the name of the islands Twinsen will develop his adventure and the name of some main characters.

The storyline is more complete and now we have some grids more and a concept art.

Ill try to update news more frequentlly but, this project wil not die!

Anyone wanting to help email me or OBrasilo, or simply post here.

Thanks to all

Agustin, Project Leader
